morphBento.heading: Engineer cities that think, move, and adapt

tiles.label: V2X Mesh
tiles.title: Vehicle-to-everything mesh network
tiles.description: Sub-10ms vehicle-to-infrastructure communication links cars, signals, and pedestrians into a living urban nervous system — preventing collisions before they form.
tiles.alt: Connected city intersection with smart traffic systems

tiles.label: LiDAR Fusion
tiles.title: Multi-sensor perception fusion
tiles.description: Fuse LiDAR, radar, and camera streams into a unified 360° world model — delivering centimeter-precision object detection in rain, fog, and darkness.
tiles.alt: Autonomous vehicle sensor array scanning environment

tiles.label: Edge AI
tiles.title: On-vehicle edge inference
tiles.description: Run transformer models directly on automotive-grade silicon — making split-second path planning decisions without cloud round-trips.
tiles.alt: AI processor chip powering edge computing in a vehicle

tiles.label: Fleet Ops
tiles.title: Autonomous fleet orchestration
tiles.description: Coordinate hundreds of autonomous shuttles, delivery bots, and robo-taxis from one control plane — optimizing routes, charging, and passenger flow in real time.
tiles.alt: Fleet of autonomous electric shuttles in an urban depot

tiles.label: City Twin
tiles.title: Urban traffic digital twin
tiles.description: Mirror entire city traffic flows in simulation — test new signal timings, road closures, and autonomy policies before deploying to real streets.
tiles.alt: Digital twin visualization of city traffic patterns

tiles.label: Safety
tiles.title: ISO 26262 safety validation
tiles.description: Formal verification pipelines validate every autonomy decision path — meeting ASIL-D requirements with full traceability from sensor input to actuator output.
tiles.alt: Engineer validating autonomous vehicle safety systems
